corpus.policy: host-specific VM logic can retire only after S1/S2 output parity, independent differential proof, and zero host fallback paths are true for all target programs in a non-empty corpus

phase18_honesty_gates.policy: Independence claim is forbidden unless retirement readiness, independent VM runtime, and no host fallback paths are all true.

milestones.title: Current host implementation can run all existing examples
Sanskript can express all current bytecode examples in source prose
Sanskript can express all current .sskyp examples in machine prose
Sanskript standard library covers text, collections, files, JSON, CLI, HTTP, and tests
Sanskript can implement a useful CLI app without Python/Rust code
Sanskript can implement a useful web app without Python/Rust app code
Sanskript can implement a useful desktop/productivity app
blocked_reasons: no example demonstrates desktop/productivity GUI surfaces (std.gui.*) end-to-end

milestones.title: Sanskript can implement a useful game loop and asset pipeline
blocked_reasons: no example uses std.game.* loop/asset surfaces

milestones.title: Sanskript can implement research/data scripts
Sanskript can implement the VM core in rakṣita
blocked_reasons: VM dispatch remains Python host (phase18 honesty gate)
no rakṣita-authored VM core source corpus in repo

milestones.title: Sanskript can implement bytecode verification in Sanskript
blocked_reasons: bytecode verification executes in Python host (phase17_toolchain / bytecode.py)
no Sanskript-source verifier module in repo

milestones.title: Sanskript can implement the compiler frontend in Sanskript
blocked_reasons: compiler frontend is Python host code
self-hosting stage is S0-host-replay (not S1 parser lowering)

milestones.title: Sanskript can implement the compiler backend in Sanskript
blocked_reasons: compiler backend lowering remains Python host code

milestones.title: Sanskript can compile its own compiler
blocked_reasons: S0-host-replay cannot claim M13 (independent compiler self-compile required)
no Phase 19 bootstrap seed with S2+ independent self-compile evidence

milestones.title: Sanskript can run its own VM
blocked_reasons: empty program corpus: M14 requires a non-empty reproducible corpus
empty_corpus=true
retirement_report.retirement_ready=false
independent_vm_runtime=false
host_fallbacks_present=true

milestones.title: Sanskript can build and test itself
blocked_reasons: host-replay cannot claim M15 (native Sanskript build+test loop required)
host pytest/tooling still required (244 Python modules inventoried)
native Sanskript test runner not yet executing the full regression matrix

milestones.title: Sanskript can emit native binaries for at least one platform
blocked_reasons: Phase 20 native-object backend remains scaffold/plan-only
no functional linked native executable on any target

milestones.title: Sanskript can emit native binaries for Windows, macOS, and Linux
blocked_reasons: Phase 20 native-object backend remains scaffold/plan-only
no functional linked native executable on any target
linked native binaries required for Windows/macOS/Linux (targets seen: [])

milestones.title: Sanskript can target web without handwritten JavaScript application code
blocked_reasons: std.web.bridge_plan reports host_bridge=true (WASM/JS emit not native)
web bridge implementation_state is not functional
generated web shell still embeds handwritten JavaScript handlers
Phase 20 web-wasm-plan rows remain scaffold-only

milestones.title: The repo no longer requires Python/Rust for ordinary Sanskript development
blocked_reasons: 244 Python modules still required for ordinary development
5 Rust modules still present (ssk-vm)
244 Python + 5 Rust modules still inventoried

milestones.title: Python/Rust remain only optional bootstrap, compatibility, or contributor convenience paths
blocked_reasons: Python/Rust are still required host paths (M19 not satisfied)
bootstrap convenience paths are not yet optional-only
host languages are still mandatory for ordinary development workflows

honesty_gates.policy: Phase 28 seal-ready means milestone reporting is honest, not that M13–M20 are achieved. Host-replay and empty corpora must never satisfy M13–M15 claims.
